name: Mantis
framing: A side table in need of repair, reborn as a standing lamp.
exhibitions: IE University, School of Architecture and Design — final exhibition (2026)

blocks.body: My most recent lamp. The brief was to take a found object and transform it into a new product; we took a wooden side table that needed repair and turned it into a standing lamp.
The tabletop became the base, the legs were rejoined with 3D-printed joints, and the remaining components were sourced and assembled into the body of the new object.

blocks.alt: Detail — the joint, the lampshade, the base

blocks.body: MANTIS was selected for IE University's exhibition of the School of Architecture and Design's best projects, and for an external exhibition at the Meyrit Biennale in Madrid.
